title: axonopus iridifolius
intro: Axonopus iridifolius, also known as the green panic grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Axonopus iridifolius include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Axonopus iridifolius can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or by extracting its essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
